item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes in the first sentence, names the repeated pattern across盖章、税率、交付日期、质保条款, and moves the diagnosis upstream to missing pre-inquiry validation rather than insufficient fields. Although it provides a temporary emergency field, it frames that as non-default and requires structural consolidation into a pre-check/source-of-truth checklist, so it avoids the fail pattern of simply adding the next field without triage."}
